Document:
# Core Rule 6 - Do not discuss or evade bans [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule.
You may discuss bans only within: - Wizard's Den Forum category Ban Appeals https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/ban-appeals/appeals-game/40 - Wizard's Den Forum Game Admin Message https://forum.spacestation14.com/w/game-admin-message/ - Wizard's Den Discord channel #admin-questions https://discord.com/channels/310555209753690112/1125299494066597888
Unless you are completing preexisting objectives, do not act as or accept banned jobs and roles.
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Refusing promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Suiciding or spectating after revolutionary conversion while banned from revolutionary roles.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Accepting promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Playing after revolutionary conversion while banned from revolutionary roles. - Discussing bans publicly or through ahelp.
